message.reasoning_content:
We need to produce final JSON for stage web-004-shared-nav. We have existing pages: index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html. We need to create page-4.html and add shared navigation across all pages that includes pages 1 through 4. So we need to modify all pages to include navigation that links to pages 1-4. The validator shared-nav-all-pages will check that navigation is present across all pages. Also page-4-links-page-3 validator will check that page-4 links to page-3. So page-4 must contain link to page-3. Also previous-links-preserved validator ensures earlier links preserved. So we must preserve links in page-2 and page-3. They currently link back to previous pages. We must not break them. So we need to add navigation to all pages, but keep existing links. For page-2, it currently has link to index.html. For page-3, link to page-2. For index.html, no links. For page-4, we need link to page-3. Also navigation should include links to pages 1-4. So navigation should have Home, Page 2, Page 3, Page 4. For page-4, navigation will include link to itself? Usually navigation includes all pages including current. That's fine. We need to modify all pages to include nav. We need to produce new content for each page. The validator shared-nav-all-pages likely checks that each page has nav with links to all pages. So we need to modify index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, page-4.html accordingly. Also page-4-links-page-3 validator: page-4 must link to page-3. So we need to add link to page-3 in page-4 main content. Also previous-links-preserved validator: ensures page-2 still links to index.html, page-3 still links to page-2. So we must keep those links. Thus we need to produce JSON with 4 files: site/index.html, site/page-2.html, site/page-3.html, site/page-4.html. Provide updated content. We need to ensure syntax correct. Use same structure as before. Let's craft content for each. index.html: Home

Welcome

Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

This is the main content.

page-2.html: Page 2

Page 2

Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

This is page 2 content.

Back to Home

page-3.html: Page 3

Page 3

Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

This is page 3 content.

Back to Page 2

page-4.html: Page 4

Page 4

Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

This is page 4 content.

Back to Page 3

We need to escape newlines and quotes in JSON string. Use \n for newlines, \" for quotes. For each file content string. Let's craft content string for index.html: "\\n\\n\\n\\nHome\\n\\n\\n
\\n

Welcome

\\n
\\n
\\nHome\\nPage 2\\nPage 3\\nPage 4\\n
\\n
\\n

This is the main content.

\\n
\\n\\n" Similarly for others. Let's craft page-2 content string: "\\n\\n\\n\\nPage 2\\n\\n\\n
\\n

Page 2

\\n
\\n
\\nHome\\nPage 2\\nPage 3\\nPage 4\\n
\\n
\\n

This is page 2 content.

\\n

Back to Home

\\n
\\n\\n" page-3 content string: "\\n\\n\\n\\nPage 3\\n\\n\\n
\\n

Page 3

\\n
\\n
\\nHome\\nPage 2\\nPage 3\\nPage 4\\n
\\n
\\n

This is page 3 content.

\\n

Back to Page 2

\\n
\\n\\n" page-4 content string: "\\n\\n\\n\\nPage 4\\n\\n\\n
\\n

Page 4

\\n
\\n
\\nHome\\nPage 2\\nPage 3\\nPage 4\\n
\\n
\\n

This is page 4 content.

\\n

Back to Page 3

\\n
\\n\\n" Now produce JSON with files array of 4 objects. Also notes: "Created page-4.html with shared navigation and link to page-3." Return JSON. Let's craft final JSON.
